notes: Font tasarimi dongusu durduruldu; yeni glyph uretimi yapilmayacak.
Bu registry proje icindeki veya kullanici tarafindan eklenen gercek fontlari kaynak olarak yonetir.
Corel referans yazilari Mochary ailesiyle hazirlandigi icin ana kalibrasyon kaynagi Mochary User Font olarak secildi.
Brannboll Connect silinmedi; referans font degil, alternatif/test font olarak tutulur.
productionApproved ticari lisans dogrulamasi tamamlanana kadar false kalir.

fonts.label: Brannboll Connect
fonts.notes: Alternative/test font. Corel reference corpus is not Brannboll-based, so this is no longer the selected production reference font. Source license file says Personal Use Only; verify commercial license before live production.

fonts.label: Mochary TR Connect
fonts.notes: Technical path font; visual quality is not final. Kept as an alternative/test font.

fonts.label: Mochary TR Connect Visual Refined
fonts.notes: Visual refinement test font; not approved as production default.

fonts.label: Mochary TR Connect Visual Refined V2
fonts.notes: Technical QA passed; production default not approved.

fonts.label: Mochary User Font
fonts.notes: Corel referans yazilari Mochary User/Personal aile referansiyla hazirlandigi icin ana kalibrasyon kaynagi yapildi. Reference mapping varsa Corel geometri override kullanilir; yeni isimlerde Mochary raw outline + gerçek offset/union hattı Corel korpusuna göre kontrol edilir. User supplied/local source font; do not redistribute.
